task_completion.description: Locate the target employee record for Marcus Reid
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the employee list or employee profile page displaying the name 'Marcus Reid'.

task_completion.description: Open the termination dialog or form
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Terminate Employment' modal, form, or screen being opened for Marcus Reid.
Look for the date '2025-01-31' entered into the termination date input field.
Look for 'Resignation' selected in the termination reason dropdown menu.
Look for the text containing 'formal resignation' and 'January 31, 2025' typed into the termination note or comment text area.

task_completion.description: Save the record and verify the employee status is updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification (e.g., 'Successfully Saved') or the employee's job status explicitly showing as 'Terminated' or 'Past Employee' on their profile.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the actions were performed within a web browser viewing the HR application (e.g., OrangeHRM), not via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure no terminal windows are open showing direct SQL commands, sqlite3, or scripts used to bypass the UI and update the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with genuine application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the termination details were entered into the actual application input fields, rather than just typed into a text editor or mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: Marcus Reid (Financial Analyst). Required Termination Date: 2025-01-31. Required Termination Reason: Resignation. Required Note Keywords: 'formal resignation', 'January 31, 2025'. The final state must show the termination record saved and the employee status updated.
